response.justification: This candidate is a highly capable senior developer with 18+ years of experience and strong technical expertise in developer tools and infrastructure, but lacks the critical people management experience required for this role. The job explicitly requires 2 years in people management and emphasizes a full-time people-leadership position, neither of which are evident in the resume. While the technical foundation is excellent, the gap in leadership and team management experience is too significant to overcome.
strengths: 18+ years of diverse software development experience across multiple languages, platforms, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS) demonstrating broad technical depth
Direct experience building developer tools and infrastructure (GitLab setup, CI/CD systems, Docker, Artifactory, microservices) aligned with engineering productivity focus
Demonstrated ability to teach and mentor through multiple workshops, talks, and organizing Refactoring Dojos, showing knowledge-sharing and mentorship orientation
concerns: No evidence of people management experience—zero track record of managing team members, conducting performance reviews, or leading direct reports, which is a core requirement for a people-leadership role
Recent career instability with increasingly shorter tenures (6 months at re:cinq, 3+ years at Optilyz) and current career gap for caregiving raises questions about availability and commitment
Limited mobile platform expertise—only one iOS/Apple TV role from 2015-2016, while the position emphasizes a major mobile platform ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Strong technical depth and developer tools expertise
Recent job tenure instability and career gap
